parameters.query:
SELECT set_config('app.company_code', $1, true);
SELECT o.sap_doc_num AS "DocNum", o.sap_doc_entry AS "DocEntry",
       o.item_code AS "ItemCode", o.item_name AS "ItemName",
       COALESCE(ic.uom, '') AS uom,
       COALESCE(ic.man_batch_num, 'N') AS "ManBtchNum",
       o.planned_qty AS "PlannedQty",
       COALESCE(o.actual_qty, 0) AS "completedQty",
       o.sap_status AS "Status", o.due_date AS "DueDate",
       o.warehouse_code AS "whsCode", '' AS "whsName",
       o.sync_status AS "SyncStatus"
FROM oms.orders o
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_items_cache ic ON ic.company_code = o.company_code AND ic.item_code = o.item_code
WHERE o.company_code = $1
  AND o.doc_type = 'WO'
  AND o.sap_doc_num = $2
  AND o.parent_id IS NULL

SELECT t.id, t.quantity, t.performed_by, t.remarks,
       t.transaction_time, t.item_code, t.item_name,
       d.id AS document_id, d.wms_status AS doc_wms_status
FROM wms.wms_documents d
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_transactions t ON t.document_id = d.id
WHERE d.company_code = $1
  AND d.doc_type = 'WO'
  AND d.doc_number = $2
ORDER BY t.transaction_time DESC
